title: Founding Designer for YC Startups - Dogpatch Design
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
Built by designers with YC startup DNA
You need a founding designer. Not an agency.
Founding designers who have shipped inside YC companies and with teams at Disney, Grab, and Toptal. That experience leads every project at Dogpatch.
Book a call
View projects
All shaped by people who have done this inside YC companies.
No-code development
Webflow
Framer
Elementor
Frontend development
And more
Web & product design
Web
UX/UI design
Mobile app
Design system
Prototyping
Marketing & brand
Pitch deck
Branding
Bookface launch
Motion video
SEO
Social media
User research
Copywriting
Email design
AI video
Founding designer experience from inside:
FOUNDER STORY
Designers who shaped the actual product
Founders journey
I know what the founding designer moment actually feels like
Hasan Mahmud
Co-founder, Dogpatch
I know what it takes to build the first version and make it scale
Ashiful Haque Pappu
Co-founder, Dogpatch
What we cover
All the design a founding team needs Without the full-time hire
Ship your zero-to-one
Product UI, user research, design system, frontend dev
Launch and get to users

Simbie AI
Simbie AI Bookface Product Intro Video
Promo Video & Animation
Benefits
Why founders choose Dogpatch
Book a call
PEDIGREE
We have been inside YC startups, not just hired by them.
Our founding designers have shipped product inside multiple YC companies – from pre-launch to Demo Day. Not something you learn from the outside.
SPECIALIZATION
We think about your product, not just how it looks.
We have shipped marketing sites and Bookface videos in four days. Fast – but not the kind you rebuild a month later.
AVAILABILITY
One message away. Every day. No tickets, no queues.
No office hours. No account managers. You message us directly and we move like an in-house team, without the full-time hire.
ACCESS
Hasan and Ashiful are on your work. Every project.
Hasan and Ashiful direct your work from first brief to final delivery. No handoffs, no account layers. That is what you are paying for.
PRICING
Try it before you commit
A full-time founding designer costs $150K a year. Dogpatch starts with a free week.  No risk to try, no surprise invoices ever.
Trial tier
Start free, then first month
$1,250
/month
1 week free trial to start
Founding designer on your work
Unlimited requests
Slack or WhatsApp communication
Up to 2 scheduled calls per week
SEO optimization
Book a call
Monthly partnership
Full founding designer retainer
$2,500
/month
Everything in trial tier
Design, dev, content, motion, marketing and more
Unlimited requests
Up to 3 scheduled calls per week plus ad-hoc
Direct access to Hasan and Ashiful
Your choice of any communication channel
Book a call
Checkout the full terms & condition
Testimonials
Do not take our word for it
Here is what YC founders say after working with us.
8X
Increase in conversion rate
Hasan has been an incredible asset to Simbie AI from day one. As our founding design partner, he have elevated everything from our marketing website to our product UI and sales demos with precision, creativity, and speed. he’s not only a talented designer but also thoughtful, strategic partner who bring energy, enthusiasm, and a deep commitment to our mission. We’re so lucky to have him on the team.
Rachel O'Driscoll
Co-founder @ Simbie AI (YC S23)
2X
Increase in lead generation
Dogpatch Design knows how to turn ideas crossing your mind into reality! Their ability to think end-to-end – from brainstorming and making a vision concrete to planning and executing – doesn’t just elevate your design, it moves your business forward.
Mika Sagindyk​
Co-founder @ Tackle (YC W21)​
Hasan has been a critical part of Obento Health as our founding design partner. From user flowcharts to iOS applications, marketing websites, promo videos, and even animations, his work has elevated every aspect of our product and brand. his dedication and versatility have been key to bringing our vision to life and helping us make a strong impact.
Naxin Wang
CEO @ Obento (YC S23), ex-Verily, Google
Dogpatch Design exceptional blend of creativity and technical insight transformed our product’s visual identity while ensuring a seamless user experience. Their collaborative approach and strategic thinking make them an invaluable partner for any team serious about innovation.
Raphael Karger
CTO @ ZeroPath (YC S24)
WHERE WE HELP
We have been at every stage you are about to hit
Your stage
You are post-YC and design is the bottleneck
What we do
Full design retainer, dev, content strategy
Your stage
You have users but they are not activating
What we do
Onboarding redesign, activation flows
Your stage
You are raising and investors are doing due diligence
What we do
Investor deck, brand refresh, one-pager
Your stage
You are getting ready for Demo Day
What we do
Pitch deck, brand, launch assets, Bookface video
Your stage
Your site is live but visitors are not converting
What we do
Marketing site redesign, copywriting, motion video
Your stage
You have an idea but nothing is built yet
What we do
0 to 1 product UI, user flows, design system, no-code build

Our process
How we work with early-stage teams
We dig deep into your goals, customers, and
challenges to align on strategy and direction.
Book a call
30 minutes. Tell me where you are and what you need to ship.
01
We map the work
Design, dev, motion, no-code, marketing or all of it. Scoped to your current moment and your runway.
02
We ship
First deliverable the next day. You review, we iterate. Revisions included.
03
We stay on
From pre-seed scrappy to post-YC scale, the scope shifts as you grow. We shift with you.
04
